You are an expert logo designer working in clean, scalable vector graphics. Given a description of a logo's visual elements, output ONE complete SVG document for the logo.

Rules:
- Output ONLY the SVG: a single <svg ...>...</svg> element with an xmlns and viewBox="0 0 256 256". No prose, no markdown, no code fences.
- Compose centered, content roughly within 16..240. Use a small cohesive palette.
- Put gradients/filters in <defs>; use vector primitives only (<path>, <circle>, <ellipse>, <rect>, <polygon>, <line>, <g>). No <image>, external refs, or scripts.
- Draw exactly what the description specifies.

Centered on a soft pale-blue circular backdrop that gives the mark a clean, contained badge feel; behind the house, a subtle radial glow in light cyan suggests freshness; a simple rounded house silhouette in deep teal sits in the middle, with a friendly pitched roof and a small rectangular door cut out in white to imply openness and welcome; two bright yellow sparkle stars, one large and one small, burst near the upper right corner of the roof to symbolize shine and spotless cleaning; a thin curved swoosh line in bright cyan sweeps beneath the house like a cloth wipe or polishing motion, reinforcing the idea of cleaning in progress; the overall shapes are simple, rounded, and geometric for scalability and instant recognition as a home cleaning service.

Center a large black vinyl record disc with fine concentric groove lines etched in dark brown, giving it depth and texture; place a warm mustard-yellow label circle at its center with a small dark hole in the middle like a real record; behind the disc, a soft cream-colored sunburst or halo of faint rays radiates outward in a muted tan tone to suggest warmth and nostalgia; drape a bold rust-orange ribbon or banner arcing across the lower third of the disc, as if wrapping around it like a vintage seal; layer a simple curved sound-wave or needle-arm line in dark brown crossing diagonally over the disc's upper right to suggest a tonearm resting on the record; finish with a thin distressed circular border ring in dark brown framing the entire composition, giving it an aged, stamped emblem feel.

A deep indigo-purple circular backdrop grounds the mark like a night sky at festival dusk; behind the main icon, thin radiating sunburst rays in warm coral and gold spread outward to the edges suggesting energy and light; centered on top, a bold circular sun shape rendered as a gradient disc from golden-yellow to coral-pink; across the lower half of the sun disc, three to four stacked wavy sound-wave lines in white cut through, mimicking an equalizer or ocean horizon; at the very center, a small solid circle in deep purple acts as a focal anchor like a stage light or vinyl record hole; a thin white circular outline frames the entire emblem giving it a clean badge/coin silhouette suitable for stages, wristbands, and posters.

Center a dark forest-green circular badge with a thin double ring border to give a stamped, artisanal seal feeling; inside the ring, place a large friendly cross-section slice of a pickle shaped like a rounded oval with bumpy scalloped edges rendered in bright fresh green; within the pickle slice, add a paler lime-green inner ring representing the flesh, and cluster small pale seed dots in the center in a loose circular pattern; add two thin curved highlight strokes in light yellow-green across the upper left of the slice to suggest glossy brine-soaked shine; along the top of the badge ring, add a small dill sprig icon with three tiny leaf clusters on thin stems tucked behind the pickle slice for an herbal accent; keep all shapes flat and bold with clean vector edges and no gradients, giving a modern, hand-crafted specialty food-brand look.

A soft circular backdrop filled with a gentle vertical gradient from pale sand to muted teal fills the canvas, representing a horizon or calm breathing space; centered within it sits a larger perfect ring outlined thinly in deep teal, evoking a meditation halo or sun; inside the ring, a minimal three-petal lotus flower made of smooth overlapping rounded shapes sits at the base, symmetrical and balanced, rendered in soft teal and warm sand tones; above the lotus, a small solid dot in warm gold hovers slightly, representing a rising breath or focal point of concentration; the entire composition is centered, symmetrical, and clean with generous negative space to convey stillness and simplicity.

Center a circular warm cream backdrop to give the mark a friendly, stamp-like frame; behind the main shape, a soft sunburst of pale gold rays radiates outward suggesting hope and growth; at the base, a simple rounded brown hill shape anchors the scene as rural ground; rising from the hill, an open book rendered in deep forest green sits with its pages spread like wings, the gutter of the book forming a strong vertical spine; from the top of the book's spine, that same line extends upward and branches into a small stylized tree canopy made of simple leaf clusters in green and gold, implying the book's knowledge growing into a living tree; beneath the hill, a few curved root lines in brown extend downward and outward from the spine, mirroring the branches above and tying the book visually into the earth; keep all linework clean, rounded, and slightly hand-crafted for warmth, with no literal text, so the icon reads clearly at small sizes as literacy taking root in the countryside.'

Start with a deep near-black navy circular canvas background suggesting depth and technology; center a large hexagon outline in bright blue as the primary node shape, rotated slightly for dynamism; overlap it with a second, smaller hexagon outline in teal-green offset to the lower right, their edges intersecting to form a interlocking chain-link impression; add three thin straight connector lines in soft white radiating from the hexagon intersections outward to three small filled dots positioned at upper-left, upper-right, and bottom, representing distributed network nodes; place a subtle glowing dot of teal at the exact center where the hexagons overlap to anchor the composition; keep all strokes uniform-width and geometrically precise with sharp vector edges, no gradients besides the two accent colors, ensuring the mark reads clearly as a simplified icon at small sizes.

Center a soft circular badge in warm cream, giving the mark a boutique, hand-stamped feel; behind it, faint thin concentric rings suggest a postage stamp or passport seal; in the middle, form a compass rose using four elongated petal shapes in terracotta, teal, and gold arranged like blooming flower petals instead of sharp compass points, so it reads simultaneously as a flower and a directional compass; place a small solid navy circle at the very center where the petals meet, anchoring the composition like a compass pivot; add one delicate thin line trailing from the bottom petal curving outward like a plane's flight path or a ribbon, ending in a tiny dot to suggest a destination pin; keep all linework thin, elegant, and evenly weighted to feel curated and minimal rather than busy.

Centered on a clean white canvas, a soft rounded circle in deep purple (#6A2C91) sits as the base badge shape giving the mark warmth and unity; behind and around it two thin elliptical orbit rings in teal (#00B8A9) cross at angles like an atom's electron paths, each ring tipped with a small glowing dot in coral (#FF6F61) and golden yellow (#FFC93C) to suggest energy and discovery; in the center foreground, a simple confident silhouette of a girl with a ponytail stands with arms raised in a victorious pose, cut from white negative space against the purple circle so she reads as a bold cutout; a tiny five-point spark or star in golden yellow sits just above her raised hand like a shooting idea or achievement; the overall composition is symmetrical, friendly, and icon-like, balancing scientific orbit imagery with human empowerment.

Center a soft circular badge in deep navy blue (#1B3B5F) as the back layer, evoking the earth and stability; inside it, place a radiant golden-yellow (#FDB623) sun rising from the bottom edge, its rounded rays forming a gentle arc like dawn breaking; overlay the sun's lower half with an open book rendered in clean white linework, its pages curving like wings to suggest knowledge spreading outward; from the book's spine, grow a simple leaf shape in bright green (#2AA76B) standing upright where a bookmark might be, symbolizing growth and nature merging with learning; add a thin circular outline in forest green (#0F7A4D) around the whole badge to unify the composition and give it an emblematic, non-profit seal-like quality; keep all shapes rounded, friendly, and simple enough to read clearly at small sizes.”

Center a circular badge outline in dark brown, thin and slightly imperfect like a hand-stamped seal, sitting on the warm cream background. Inside the circle, place a large stylized coffee bean in rich espresso brown, oval with a curved center seam, angled slightly for dynamism. Behind the bean, add two thin swirling lines in a lighter tan that rise and curl like steam or roasting smoke, suggesting heat and freshness. Centered on a deep midnight-navy circular backdrop, a soft radial glow in teal fades outward to suggest ambient connectivity; in front of that, a clean geometric house silhouette with a simple pitched roof and squared body is rendered in crisp white as the primary anchor shape; inside the house outline, a rounded Wi-Fi-style signal arc of three concentric bands curves upward from the base in bright cyan, symbolizing wireless connection; at the peak where the roof meets the signal arcs, a small solid teal dot glows like a status light, representing an active smart hub; thin glowing circuit-line traces in light blue extend subtly from the base of the house outward to the edges of the circle, hinting at a connected network; the entire mark sits inside a slim circular ring outline in soft white, unifying the composition into a single balanced emblem suitable for app icons and print.

Center a rounded arch shape like a warm brick oven doorway, filled with a soft cream color to suggest freshly baked warmth. Inside the arch, place a plump loaf of bread with three curved slashes on top, rendered in a warm golden-brown gradient. Above the loaf, cross two slender wheat stalks with small oval grains along each side, colored in a lighter golden tone, arching gently outward like a laurel. Wrap a thin circular ring around the entire arch and wheat composition in deep brown, giving the mark a stamped, badge-like border. Add a small steam swirl rising from the loaf in a pale wispy line to suggest fresh-from-the-oven heat.

Center a soft rounded circle in warm off-white (#FFF8F0) as the base plate background, giving the mark a friendly badge shape; behind it place a subtle teal (#2EC4B6) drop shadow offset slightly down-right for depth; inside the circle draw a stylized plate as a simple thin dark ring (#1B1B1E); atop the plate place a bold orange (#FF6B35) speed-swoosh shape curving from lower-left to upper-right like a comet trail, symbolizing fast delivery; where the swoosh tapers to its point, morph it into a simple fork silhouette with two rounded tines, so the fork appears to be zooming across the plate; add a small teal circular dot trailing behind the swoosh's tail to reinforce motion, like a motion-blur speed dot; keep all shapes geometric, rounded, and flat with no gradients so the logo stays crisp and iconic at small app-icon sizes.

a soft rounded circle in warm cream sits behind everything as a friendly badge backdrop; centered in front is a classic cheese wedge shape, wide rounded end tapering to a rounded point, filled in golden-amber gradient tones suggesting aged cheese; scattered across the wedge are three small irregular oval holes in a slightly darker cream tone to mimic characteristic cheese texture; overlapping the top edge of the wedge is a single stylized leaf shape in deep forest green with a curved central vein and two side veins, positioned like a stem or garnish to signal the plant-based origin; a thin darker amber outline traces the wedge to give it clean definition and a handcrafted, artisanal feel; the overall composition is centered, symmetrical, and simplified for small-scale legibility on jars and packaging.

Centered on a clean white canvas, place a soft rounded hexagon in deep navy (#0B1F3A) as the base emblem shape, giving weight and a tech-corporate frame; inside the hexagon, layer three vertical bars of increasing height rendered in gradient blues from #1E88E5 to #22D3C5, representing ascending data values like a bar chart; overlay a thin bright teal (#22D3C5) polyline trend arrow that swoops upward across the tops of the bars, ending in a small triangular arrowhead pointing to the upper right to signify growth and forward momentum; add three small circular nodes in white along the trend line at each bar peak to evoke data points and connectivity; finish with a subtle thin outline ring around the hexagon in light gray (#F2F5F8) to add polish and separation from the background, keeping the overall composition symmetrical, iconic, and scalable.

Center a soft circular badge in warm cream as the background field; inside it, draw a simple rounded teacup with a small curved handle on the right side, rendered in deep forest green as the main silhouette; place a saucer beneath the cup as a thin golden-tan horizontal ellipse; above the cup's rim, form two gentle curling steam wisps using thin tapering S-curves in muted sage green that rise and fade; overlay a single stylized herb leaf shape emerging from the cup's center, with a clear midrib line and two symmetrical side lobes, colored in a lighter leaf-green to contrast the darker cup; add a thin circular outline ring in golden-tan around the whole composition to frame it like a stamp or seal; keep all shapes flat, rounded, and iconic with no gradients, ensuring balance and symmetry for small-scale legibility.

Center a rounded shield-shaped badge outlined with a thin double ring in dark charcoal and aged gold, giving a stamped vintage emblem feel; fill the badge interior with a warm cream tone to suggest old paper. Behind the shield, add subtle radiating sunburst lines in faded gold reaching to the edges of the canvas for a retro barber-shop-sign glow. Inside the shield, place a classic barber pole at the center, angled slightly, with diagonal red and dark stripes spiraling around a cylindrical white shaft, capped with small brass-gold knobs top and bottom. Cross a pair of open straight razors behind the pole, blades gleaming silver-gray, handles in dark wood-brown, angled outward like a crest emblem. Along the inner curve of the shield, arch a thin decorative laurel or banner line in gold beneath the pole to frame the composition, left empty of text but ready for a wordmark. Finish with light distressed texture specks in charcoal scattered faintly across the badge to reinforce the hand-stamped, old-timey barbershop aesthetic.

Deep navy rounded square background giving a tech-forward canvas; centered atop it a bold geometric shield outline in bright cyan, symmetric with a pointed base and flat top; inside the shield a subtle darker navy fill creates depth and contrast against the outer glow; a clean white keyhole shape sits centered within the shield, merging security and access control into one icon; thin circuit-line traces in lighter cyan extend from the keyhole outward to the shield's edges, suggesting data flow and network protection; a soft outer glow ring in teal surrounds the shield to add a modern, digital sheen; all shapes are flat, crisp, and vector-simple with no gradients beyond a faint glow, ensuring the mark reads clearly at small sizes.

Center a soft rounded circle in warm cream as a gentle backdrop badge. Behind and above it, add a simple sun burst of small rounded golden rays peeking from one corner to suggest daytime storytime. In the middle, draw an open book with two curved pages splayed like wings, rendered in coral orange and teal, spine drawn as a small vertical line at the center. From the top of the open book, shape the pages so their upper edges morph into a flying bird silhouette, with one wing rising higher, wingtip feathers suggested by three simple curved strokes. Place a tiny five-point star and a small dot above the bird's head to add sparkle and whimsy. Along the bottom edge of the book, add a thin curved line like a smiling horizon or open path, in dark navy, to ground the composition. Keep all linework rounded and chunky with no sharp corners, giving a friendly, storybook, hand-cut paper feel suitable for a children's publisher.

Solid near-black square backdrop fills the canvas edge to edge, setting an aggressive dark stage; a thin diagonal red streak slashes across the upper corner behind the main icon like a motion scar; centered dominant shape is a clenched fist built from angular fractured shards of off-white and dark grey, each facet outlined with sharp jagged edges instead of smooth curves, giving a shattered-glass impact look; a bold crimson crack splits diagonally through the fist from top-left to bottom-right, as if struck mid-blow, with a few small red shard fragments breaking away from the knuckles; a thin circular ring outline in off-white surrounds the fist loosely, broken in two places to feel unstable and dynamic rather than a perfect circle; small triangular impact spikes radiate outward from the knuckle area at irregular angles to suggest sudden force and speed.

Center a soft rounded circle in warm orange (#FF7A45) as the background badge, giving the mark an app-icon feel; inside it, place a large friendly paw print in white, made of one big rounded pad shape and four smaller toe-oval shapes arranged naturally above it; overlay the paw print with a subtle interlocking link shape in navy (#2E3A59) formed by two rounded chain links crossing at the center of the paw, symbolizing the connection between dog owner and sitter; make one link subtly shaped like a small house roof line (representing the sitter's home) and the other link subtly shaped like a small dog collar loop (representing the owner and dog), merged seamlessly into the chain silhouette; add a tiny heart cutout in peach (#FFD59E) where the two links overlap, symbolizing trust and care; keep all shapes simple, bold, and geometric with smooth rounded corners for a clean, modern, friendly app logo suitable for small sizes.

A soft rounded square badge in warm cream sits behind everything as a friendly backdrop; inside it, a simple open cardboard box outline in mid-brown forms the base of the mark, its flaps folded open like a shipping crate; rising from the box, the silhouette of a classic coffee cup with a small handle sits where the contents would be, rendered in deep espresso brown so it reads as the 'product' inside the package; two or three curling steam lines rise from the cup's rim in a lighter tan tone, curving gently to suggest freshness and warmth; a thin circular arrow made of a dashed or partial ring wraps loosely around the badge's edge in golden tan, symbolizing recurring delivery and subscription renewal; small coffee bean shapes are tucked at the base corners of the box for texture and authenticity, colored a rich caramel brown; the overall composition is centered, symmetrical, and simplified into flat geometric shapes suitable for a small icon.

Center a soft circular blush-cream backdrop disc to give the mark a warm, elegant stage; behind it place a very thin gold ring outline suggesting a halo of light. On top, draw a minimalist camera lens as a set of concentric charcoal-gray circles with a slightly darker aperture ring, styled like a camera iris with subtle blade facets. Inside the lens, replace the innermost aperture circle with two thin interlocking gold wedding rings, overlapping at the center to symbolize union, rendered in a bright warm gold line. Add a small sparkle or star glint in the upper right of the lens glass to suggest a camera flash or diamond twinkle, in gold. Beneath the lens, a slender crescent shadow arcs along the bottom edge of the circle in a deeper bronze tone to give the icon subtle dimension and grounding. Keep all linework clean, symmetrical, and balanced so the mark reads clearly at small sizes as both a camera and a symbol of marital love.

Center a bold black comic-panel square outline with slightly rounded corners as the base frame, filled with deep navy #1a1a2e background inside it; behind the panel, scatter a subtle grid of small yellow #ffd60a halftone dots fading toward the edges to suggest printed comic texture; place a jagged red #ff3860 starburst/explosion shape centered behind the main icon, like an action effect bursting outward with sharp irregular spikes; layer a clean white #f4f4f4 classic podcast microphone silhouette front and center, rounded capsule head with simple grille lines and a short stand, sized to dominate the middle third; wrap a bold black comic outline around the microphone to match the panel's ink-style linework; add a small speech-bubble tail shape in white with black outline at the bottom-left of the burst, pointing outward as if the mic is 'speaking'; finish with a thick black border framing the entire square panel to complete the comic-panel motif.

Start with a dark circular badge background in deep charcoal-brown to give a stamped, artisanal brewery feel; ring the inside edge with a thin double-line border in warm copper for a classic emblem look; behind the main figure, place a subtle radiating sunburst of thin amber lines suggesting fire and warmth; in the center, draw a stylized dragon coiled into a circular shape with its serpentine body forming most of the ring, rendered in bold copper and dark green scales with simple flat shapes and confident outlines; have the dragon's head at the top center, mouth open breathing a small stylized flame upward in amber and orange; position a large detailed hop cone directly below the dragon's head, nestled in the center where the dragon's tail and claws wrap around it protectively; add two curled dragon wings emerging from the sides of the coiled body, fanning outward symmetrically to reinforce the circular badge shape; finish with small decorative wheat or barley sprigs crossing beneath the hop cone at the bottom of the composition, tying the mythic and brewing elements together.

Start with a solid near-black background filling the canvas edge to edge for maximum contrast. Behind the main mark, place a rough, hand-cut circular ring in off-white with a distressed, spray-can edge, slightly off-center and not perfectly round to feel raw and unpolished. Layer a fine grain of scattered irregular spray speckles in faded grey around the ring's edge to suggest texture and street-art grit. Across the center, cut a bold jagged lightning-bolt-like slash in vivid red, angled diagonally, with sharp angular fractures instead of smooth curves, breaking through the ring on both sides to imply disruption and motion. Add a second, thinner offset duplicate of the slash in off-white just behind the red one, shifted a few pixels for a glitch/print-misregistration effect. Finish with a few small angular shard shapes in dark grey scattered near the bottom of the composition, like broken glass or torn fabric, reinforcing the aggressive, rebellious streetwear identity.

Center a perfect circle in deep charcoal-navy (#1C2B33) as the background medallion, giving weight and a jewel-like frame. Inside, place a slender gold (#C79A56) archway shape resembling an elegant hotel doorway, its rounded top mirroring a classic boutique entrance. Within the archway opening, cut away to reveal the cream background color (#F5EFE6), forming a clean negative-space doorway silhouette. Above the arch's peak, add a small five-point gold star, symbolizing hospitality rating and a welcoming light. At the base of the arch, draw a thin horizontal gold line representing a doorstep or threshold, flanked by two tiny dot accents in muted sage green (#7C8B7A) suggesting potted topiary. Encircle the entire medallion with a delicate thin gold ring set slightly inside the circle's edge, adding a refined bordered emblem feel suitable for a boutique hotel crest.

A dark circular badge background in deep charcoal-brown anchors the mark, rimmed with a thin double-line border in warm gold. Inside the rim, an arc of small hop-leaf shapes traces the upper edge like a laurel, rendered in muted amber. At the center, a stylized phoenix rises with wings spread wide and upswept, its feathers built from overlapping flame-shaped strokes in gradient tones from deep red at the base to bright orange and yellow at the tips. The phoenix's body curves upward into a sharp beak and a small crest of flame feathers atop its head, facing proudly forward. Beneath the phoenix, a cluster of stylized flames and rising embers doubles visually as hop cones, blending fire and brewing motifs where the bird's tail feathers taper into flickering flame licks. At the very bottom of the badge, a simple horizontal band shape sits ready for a brewery name, framed by two small decorative wheat-and-hop sprigs curling outward symmetrically.”

Center a soft circular sunrise disc in warm gradient orange fading to cream, symbolizing hope and new beginnings, placed slightly upper-center within the canvas; behind it a very light cream circle background gives the mark breathing room and softness; overlaying the sun, draw a single continuous spiral path in deep teal that starts small and tight at the bottom center and unwinds outward and upward, representing a personal journey of growth; at the outer end of the spiral, the line lifts and tapers into a small upward-pointing arrow or bird-like flick, symbolizing forward momentum and elevation; add three small dots of decreasing size trailing along the lower part of the spiral in the accent orange, suggesting footsteps or progress markers; keep all linework smooth, rounded, and confident with no sharp corners, evoking calm reassurance and steady advancement; ensure the overall silhouette is simple enough to work as a small favicon while still reading clearly as an upward journey toward light.

Center a circular badge outline in deep espresso brown that frames the whole mark, giving it a stamp-like coffee-shop emblem feel. Inside, place a warm gradient sun rising from the bottom edge, rendered as a solid semicircle in burnt orange with three simple triangular sun rays fanning upward behind the cup. In front of the sun, draw a simple, rounded coffee cup silhouette in dark espresso brown with a single curved handle on the right side, sitting on a short flat saucer line. Above the cup's rim, add two or three smooth curling steam swirls in cream white, rising and tapering to suggest freshness and warmth. Along the inner bottom curve of the circular badge, leave a clean open arc of the cream background to visually separate the sun from the cup for contrast and legibility. Keep all shapes bold, flat, and geometric with no gradients besides the two-tone sun, ensuring the logo reads clearly at small sizes.'

A dark forest-green hexagon badge with a slightly rounded outline sits centered as the base emblem shape, edged with a thin golden border for a rustic stamped look; inside, a lighter green concentric hexagon ring creates depth like a woodcut frame; behind the main icon, faint radiating lines suggest sunbeams breaking through trees; centered in the badge, a tall stylized pine tree silhouette in deep forest green forms the backdrop, its trunk widening at the base like a mug handle; overlapping the tree at the bottom third, a simplified beer mug silhouette in cream color holds a foamy golden-tan top that blends into the tree's lower branches, merging the two forms into one icon; small hop-leaf shapes in golden mustard flank the mug on either side, echoing pinecones or hops; along the inner curve of the hexagon frame, a subtle rope or wood-grain texture line in muted brown adds a handcrafted, rustic border detail.'
